task_completion.description: Load the sample_polygon.geojson vector layer into QGIS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS Layers panel shows 'sample_polygon' loaded.

task_completion.description: Open the Rasterize (Vector to Raster) tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Rasterize (Vector to Raster)' dialog window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the burn-in field and output resolution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rasterize dialog, 'Field to use for a burn-in value' is set to 'area_sqkm', 'Output raster size units' is set to Georeferenced units, and both Horizontal and Vertical resolutions are set to 0.005.

task_completion.description: Set the output extent and nodata value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rasterize dialog, 'Output extent' is set to the sample_polygon layer extent, and 'Assign a specified nodata value to output bands' is set to -9999.

task_completion.description: Save the output GeoTIFF to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Rasterized' output file path in the dialog is set to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/polygon_raster.tif', or the resulting raster is shown in the Layers panel after execution.

task_completion.description: Save the QGIS project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGIS window title shows 'rasterize_project' or a 'Save Project' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/rasterize_project.qgs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the QGIS application and Rasterize dialog, rather than terminal commands like 'gdal_rasterize'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Python scripts or terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows or Python consoles showing scripts that directly generate the raster or project files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_polygon.geojson. Expected output raster: /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/polygon_raster.tif. Expected QGIS project: /home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/rasterize_project.qgs. Burn-in field: 'area_sqkm' (values 10.5 and 8.2). Resolution: 0.005 degrees. Nodata value: -9999. Extent matches input layer.
